headline: Skullcandy’s bass-boosting Crusher headphones now come with Bose’s ANC
summary: Skullcandy's Crusher headphones now feature Bose's QuietControl ANC and spatial audio. The Crusher line uses dedicated bass drivers for enhanced deeper frequencies. This update blends Skullcandy's signature bass with Bose's premium noise-cancelling tech.

headline: HP’s OLED-equipped 2-in-1 laptop is a solid back-to-school deal
summary: Best Buy offers a significant discount on the HP OmniBook X Flip 2-in-1 laptop. It features an Intel Core 7 Ultra CPU, 16GB RAM, and an OLED display. Priced at $999.99, down from $1,649.99, it's a rare deal amid high memory costs.

headline: Apple’s reportedly raising the price for AppleCare Plus on Macs and iPads
summary: AppleCare Plus subscriptions for Macs and iPads are reportedly set to increase in price. New sign-ups will see a rise of $0.50 per month or $5 per year. Existing subscribers will not be affected by the price change.

headline: Valve says iFixit will keep selling Steam Deck batteries after all
summary: Valve confirms iFixit will continue to sell Steam Deck LCD replacement batteries. This reverses an earlier surprising decision to discontinue the batteries. It ensures customers can still perform self-repairs on their handheld devices.

headline: Fantasy Tactical RPG Langrisser: Sea of Sword Announced with Debut Trailer
summary: A new fantasy tactical RPG, 'Langrisser: Sea of Sword,' has been announced. The announcement included the release of its debut trailer. This expands the popular Langrisser series with a new title.

headline: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil Runtime Revealed, and It Matches Early Audience Reactions
summary: The official runtime for Zach Cregger's Resident Evil adaptation has been revealed. Its length is comparable to the original 2002 film. The runtime aligns with initial audience reactions, suggesting a substantial experience.

headline: The Popular Budget-Friendly Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer Drops to Just $155 Shipped
summary: The Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D printer is now available for just $155. This budget-friendly printer is praised for consistent quality prints. It offers a significant saving for those seeking an affordable 3D printing solution.

headline: The Tiny Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC With 24GB of DDR5 RAM and USB 4 Ports Drops Below $300
summary: The compact Aoostar Ryzen 7 Pro 6850H Mini PC is now priced under $300. It boasts 24GB DDR5 RAM and versatile USB 4 ports. This Mac Mini-sized PC is powerful enough for light gaming and various tasks.

headline: Argentina shatter England's World Cup dreams in semi-final
summary: Argentina dramatically defeated England in the World Cup semi-final. They scored two late goals to come from behind in Atlanta. This victory ended England's World Cup aspirations.

headline: Argentina face action after waving Falklands banner
summary: Argentina players celebrated their World Cup semi-final win with a Falklands banner. Fifa is expected to take disciplinary action against the team. The banner expressed support for Argentina's claims to the Falkland Islands.

headline: Government brings British Steel under public ownership
summary: The Scunthorpe steelworks has been nationalised by the government. This action follows new government powers passed this week. British Steel is now under public ownership.

headline: Starmer on final trip to Ukraine as PM pledges UK's 'cast-iron' support
summary: The Prime Minister is scheduled to meet Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky in Kyiv. This visit marks Starmer's final trip to Ukraine in his current role. The UK pledges its unwavering, 'cast-iron' support to Ukraine.
